assessment_objectives.objective: system, application and service users are identified.
the identity of each user is authenticated or verified as a prerequisite to system access.
processes acting on behalf of users are associated with uniquely identified and authenticated system users.
the identity of each process acting on behalf of a user is authenticated or verified as a prerequisite to system access.
the identity of each device accessing or connecting to the system is authenticated or verified as a prerequisite to system access.
the unique identification of authenticated organizational users is associated with processes acting on behalf of those users.
devices accessing the system are identified.
individual identifiers are managed by uniquely identifying each individual as <A.03.05.05.ODP[02]: characteristic>.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: privileged or non-privileged users; contractors, foreign nationals, and/or non-organizational users
